strategic_alpha.reasoning: Real differentiation on conversion signals vs follower count, but crowded market and unclear product reality behind login wall.

execution_grit.reasoning: Pricing opacity and login wall make T2 delivery claims unverifiable; risk of AI-washing.

craft_and_soul.reasoning: PH #3 placement suggests reasonable UX but opaque pricing damages first impression.

value_signal.reasoning: No public pricing = poor transparency; estimated $99-$649/mo is high end for unverified ROI claims.

claims.claim: Demo page or marketing site is publicly accessible
claims.evidence: The homepage is publicly accessible at https://www.influcio.com/

claims.claim: Platform screenshots or demo video available showing influencer discovery UI

claims.evidence: Connecting 4M+ creators and 100k average followers per influencer across platforms with intelligent insights.
The corpus does not mention a pricing page or any estimated ranges.

claims.claim: End-to-end workflow claim (discovery → outreach → optimization) shown in public material
claims.evidence: From vague ideas to concrete strategies — designed around your goals, budget, and desired impact, turning concepts into actionable, launch-ready plans.
